nasb.text: Deliver those who are being taken away to death, And those who are staggering to slaughter, Oh hold them back.

esv.text: Rescue those who are being taken away to death; hold back those who are stumbling to the slaughter.

cnv.text: 被拉到死地的人，你要拯救； 將要被殺戮的人，你要挽救。

ccb.text: 被拉去屠杀的，你要抢救； 踉跄受死的，你要拦阻。

csbs.text: 有人被拉向死地，你要解救； 有人踉跄着去杀戮之地，你一定要拦阻！
